message:
🐛 Fix GPU Overview card: mark as live data, remove dead demo hook (#1133)

* 🐛 Show skeleton instead of demo-data flash on Nightly E2E card

When navigating to the llm-d Benchmarks dashboard, the Nightly E2E
card would briefly flash demo data (with yellow border and Demo badge)
before real data loaded. This happened because useCardLoadingState
saw hasAnyData=true from the demo initialData, so it never showed
the skeleton.

Fix: only set hasAnyData=true when we have real (non-demo) data,
so the skeleton displays during the initial fetch.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix GPU Overview card metadata: mark as live data, remove dead demo hook

The GPU Overview card already uses real data via useGPUNodes() in its
custom component, but the unified card config incorrectly declared
isDemoData: true / isLive: false. This caused compliance test confusion.

Removes the dead useGPUOverview demo hook and DEMO_GPU_OVERVIEW constant
from registerHooks.ts, and removes gpu_overview from the unified adapter
card list since it uses a custom component.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,19 +12,13 @@ export const gpuOverviewConfig: UnifiedCardConfig = {
   iconColor: 'text-green-400',
   defaultWidth: 4,
   defaultHeight: 3,
-  dataSource: { type: 'hook', hook: 'useGPUOverview' },
+  dataSource: { type: 'hook', hook: 'useGPUNodes' },
   content: {
-    type: 'stats-grid',
-    stats: [
-      { field: 'total', label: 'Total GPUs', color: 'blue' },
-      { field: 'available', label: 'Available', color: 'green' },
-      { field: 'inUse', label: 'In Use', color: 'orange' },
-      { field: 'avgUtilization', label: 'Avg Util %', color: 'purple', format: 'percentage' },
-    ],
+    type: 'custom',
   },
   emptyState: { icon: 'Cpu', title: 'No GPUs', message: 'No GPU data available', variant: 'info' },
   loadingState: { type: 'stats', count: 4 },
-  isDemoData: true,
-  isLive: false,
+  isDemoData: false,
+  isLive: true,
 }
 export default gpuOverviewConfig
